theme: Have You Ever Seen a Whale?

sentences.english: Whale watching has become popular in many coastal parts of the world.
sentences.korean: 고래 관찰이 세계 여러 해안 지역에서 인기를 얻었어요.

sentences.english: But watching whales is very different from what humans used to do: hunt and kill them — an activity known as whaling.
sentences.korean: 하지만 고래를 보는 것은 인간이 하던 포경 — 고래를 사냥하고 죽이는 활동과는 매우 달라요.

sentences.english: Last year marked the 40th anniversary of the International Whaling Commission's ban on commercial whaling.
Since then, whale populations have slowly recovered.
sentences.korean: 그 이후 고래 개체수가 서서히 회복되었어요.

quiz.question: What does '매혹적인, 넋을 빼앗는' mean in English?
